note: Producer-independent cross-machine verification of the deterministic core (Lane D contract). The Python parity module was executed on separate machines with no shared code beyond the module; all produced byte-identical seed / x0 / terminal / checkpoints. Full anchor verification (TSA/OTS/Rekor) rides the Lane-D pack; this outcome pins the shared deterministic surface.
duration_note: wall-clock verification duration differs per machine and is not treated as an evidence failure (Lane D contract)
